items.title: 'Controversial' North Korean invasion setting for next Call of Duty game
items.dek: Developer Infinity Ward said the game will be "grounded in the military authenticity" the series is known for.
items.body: Developer Infinity Ward said the game will be "grounded in the military authenticity" the series is known for.

items.title: Former US attorney general Pam Bondi testifies in congressional Epstein probe
items.dek: The testimony comes about a month after America's top prosecutor was ousted by US President Donald Trump.
items.body: The testimony comes about a month after America's top prosecutor was ousted by US President Donald Trump.
